category.scope_note: Portable lithium battery cells, battery packs, and power banks (China export to Armenia via EAEU / EAC) compliance gap comparison.

title.en: China-to-Armenia Lithium Battery & Power Bank Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国锂电池/移动电源进入亚美尼亚：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國鋰電池/行動電源進入亞美尼亞：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China lithium battery and power bank documentation against Armenia (EAEU / EAC) requirements: EAEU TR CU 004/2011 and 020/2011 conformity with the EAC mark on GOST IEC 62133 basis, TR EAEU 037/2016 hazardous-substance restriction, UN 38.3 transport, and the in-country importer obligation.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国锂电池/移动电源合规文件与亚美尼亚（EAEU / EAC）要求对照：基于GOST IEC 62133的EAEU TR CU 004/2011与020/2011合格评定及EAC标志、TR EAEU 037/2016有害物质限制、UN 38.3运输及在地进口商义务。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國鋰電池/行動電源合規文件與亞美尼亞（EAEU / EAC）要求對照：基於GOST IEC 62133的EAEU TR CU 004/2011與020/2011合格評定及EAC標誌、TR EAEU 037/2016有害物質限制、UN 38.3運輸及在地進口商義務。

disclaimer.en: For informational purposes only. Not legal advice. Regulations change; verify all requirements with qualified legal and technical advisors before export. This page does not constitute a certification decision, legal opinion, accredited-body assessment, customs determination, or market-access approval.
disclaimer.zh: 仅供参考，不构成法律意见。法规随时变化，出口前请向具备资质的法律及技术顾问核实所有要求。本页不构成认证结论、法律意见、认可机构评审、海关裁定或市场准入批准。
disclaimer.zht: 僅供參考，不構成法律意見。法規隨時變化，出口前請向具備資質的法律及技術顧問核實所有要求。本頁不構成認證結論、法律意見、認可機構評審、海關裁定或市場准入批准。

answer_first.en: Chinese lithium battery and power bank exporters to Armenia must obtain EAEU Customs Union conformity (the EAC mark) under TR CU 004/2011 and TR CU 020/2011 on a GOST IEC 62133 testing basis, meet the TR EAEU 037/2016 hazardous-substance restriction, hold a valid UN 38.3 transport report, and route the product through an in-country EAEU importer — none of which are satisfied by Chinese GB 31241 or CCC certification.
answer_first.zh: 中国锂电池及移动电源出口至亚美尼亚的出口商，须依据TR CU 004/2011及TR CU 020/2011、在GOST IEC 62133检测基础上取得EAEU关税同盟合格评定（EAC标志），满足TR EAEU 037/2016有害物质限制，持有有效UN 38.3运输报告，并通过在地EAEU进口商进入市场——上述要求均无法由中国GB 31241或CCC认证替代。
answer_first.zht: 中國鋰電池及行動電源出口至亞美尼亞的出口商，須依據TR CU 004/2011及TR CU 020/2011、在GOST IEC 62133檢測基礎上取得EAEU關稅同盟合格評定（EAC標誌），滿足TR EAEU 037/2016有害物質限制，持有有效UN 38.3運輸報告，並通過在地EAEU進口商進入市場——上述要求均無法由中國GB 31241或CCC認證替代。

editorial_controls.review_cycle: Rows must be re-checked against EAEU / EEC and SARM primary sources each review cycle before human_reviewed can be set true.
editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag. Official EAEU (eaeunion.org), EEC (eurasiancommission.org), SARM, or equivalent authority sources preferred; local PDFs are not accepted.
